articles.author: Finya Swai
articles.title: Ebola outbreak zone cases up almost 40 percent in a week - The Hill
articles.description: The Ebola outbreak in Congo that’s spread across parts of Africa has killed more than 200 people in its first month and is considered the worst known outbreak at this stage, the Africa Centres for Disease Control and Prevention (Africa CDC) said Thursday. Ebo…
